CIPHER.437.cipherString: This sort of innovation occurs when you set out to improve an electric tea kettle and misplace a decimal.
CIPHER.437.question: This flavor text from a Magic: the Gathering card has been encrypted as an Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.437.author: Livy

CIPHER.438.cipherString: Life is a rich strain of music suggesting a realm too fair to be.
CIPHER.438.question: Etched into the surface of a melted vinyl record, you found this Nihilist Substitution-encrypted quote by G. W. Curtis with a keyword of CELLO and polybius key of COMPOSITIONAL. What does it say?
CIPHER.438.author: G. W. Curtis

CIPHER.448.cipherString: Twilight remained, a fairy half-light in which all things looked much more charming than they really were.
CIPHER.448.question: Written in glow-in-the-dark ink on the ceiling of the bio lab, uncover this Aristocrat quote by Murray Leinster using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.448.author: Murray Leinster

CIPHER.440.cipherString: The last rose of summer, Left blooming alone.
CIPHER.440.question: The words below form a type of poem that you think is really a cover for another, hidden, poetic message. The deciphered text starts with THE L. What does it say?
CIPHER.440.author: The words below form a type of poem that you think is really a cover for another, hidden, poetic message.

CIPHER.439.cipherString: It is contrary to reason to say that there is a vacuum or space in which there is absolutely nothing.
CIPHER.439.question: Hidden in the margin of a library book on black holes: this Aristocrat version of a quote by René Descartes. What does it say?
CIPHER.439.author: René Descartes

CIPHER.441.cipherString: Borrow trouble for yourself, if that's your nature, but don't lend it to your neighbors.
CIPHER.441.question: A quote by Rudyard Kipling has been encoded using the Complete Columnar Cipher for you to decode. The quote has YOURSELF somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.441.author: Rudyard Kipling

CIPHER.442.cipherString: Soy como el aire que me lleva: violento pero delicado, y siempre presente. Juntos volamos más allá de la imaginación.
CIPHER.442.question: This flavor text from the Spanish-language edition of a Magic: the Gathering card has been encoded as a Xenocrypt using a K2 alphabet with an English keyword. What does it say?

CIPHER.443.cipherString: Frame your mind to mirth and merriment Which bars a thousand harms and lengthens life.
CIPHER.443.question: An old piece of advice has been encoded as a Checkerboard cipher with a polybius key of DISCIPLINE. What does it say?

CIPHER.444.cipherString: Every man feels instinctively that all the beautiful sentiments in the world weigh less than a single lovely action.
CIPHER.444.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Patristocrat encoded quote by James Russell Lowell using a K1 alphabet. It is offered without a hint. What does it say?
CIPHER.444.author: James Russell Lowell

CIPHER.445.question: A message in a bottle washed up in the school's decorative fountain, and now you can decode this Cryptarithm cipher text. What do the values 458315 7519608 decode to?

CIPHER.447.cipherString: Life is a big canvas--throw all the paint you can at it.
CIPHER.447.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote by Danny Kaye, encrypted using a Baconian cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.447.author: Danny Kaye

CIPHER.449.cipherString: If you build up the soil with organic material, the plants will do just fine.
CIPHER.449.question: Someone gave you a piece of advice by John Harrison encoded as a Porta, and told you it would be helpful for a project you're doing. The 20th through 23rd cipher characters (AWCP) decode to be WITH.
CIPHER.449.author: John Harrison

CIPHER.450.cipherString: Coral reefs and polar ecosystems are highly vulnerable.
CIPHER.450.question: The following quote about climate change has been encoded as a Fractionated Morse cipher.  You are told that the quote has REEF in it corresponding to the encoded text S A T U A, meaning A = ●×●; S = ×●–; T = ×●×; U = ●●–. What does it say?

CIPHER.451.cipherString: I recruited my dad to be my bass player and fired him on several occasions. He stayed on as a bus driver.
CIPHER.451.question: You open a forgotten email draft saved in the school's computer system. It holds a quote by Chely Wright encoded as a random Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.451.author: Chely Wright

CIPHER.446.cipherString: Doctors are saying not to worry about the bird flu because it's tweetable.
CIPHER.446.question: The passage below is a pun that has been encoded with the Checkerboard cipher. The 27th through 31st cipher units (OP BC RH IP IR) decode to be ABOUT. What does it say?
CIPHER.446.author: Unknown

CIPHER.455.cipherString: Go from ordinary hero to world-shaking legend; this compendium of player options awakens new possibilities for your hero.
CIPHER.455.question: This blurb from the back of a new book about adventures has been encoded as a K2 Aristocrat cipher for you to solve.

CIPHER.452.cipherString: Don't plant a seed just a day before you need the fruit.
CIPHER.452.question: A mysterious app update added this Baconian lock screen—it's actually Kirtida Gautam's quote. What does it say?
CIPHER.452.author: Kirtida Gautam

CIPHER.453.cipherString: I have always sought a solitary life. The riverbanks and the open fields and the groves know it.
CIPHER.453.question: You found the following carved into the bark of a hollow log. You recognize that it's encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?

CIPHER.454.cipherString: Did time move forward, through people, or did people move through it like clouds across the sky?
CIPHER.454.question: A fragment of text is discovered in a time capsule from 1965. It's a quote by Anthony Doerr encrypted as a Complete Columnar Cipher. The quote has ACROSS somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.454.author: Anthony Doerr

CIPHER.459.cipherString: If this did happen, I wouldn't be able to tell you about it, since I would have been sworn to secrecy by the local Sun Warriors.
CIPHER.459.question: This passage is from the book Beasts of the Four Nations: Creatures from Avatar: The Last Airbender and The Legend of Korra. It has been encoded as a K1 Aristocrat cipher. Which key phrase was used to encode it?

CIPHER.456.cipherString: the thunder roars the storm intensifies but still i drink the falling droplets
CIPHER.456.question: A passage from a poem has been encoded as a Checkerboard cipher with a polybius key of PRECIPITATION. What does it say?

CIPHER.457.cipherString: I was forced to live far beyond my years when just a child, now I intend to remain young indefinitely.
CIPHER.457.question: A strange code appears in the footer of a document you print from the lab computer. It's a quote by Mary Pickford, encoded in a Patristocrat using a K2 alphabet. You are told that it begins with I WAS. What does it say?
CIPHER.457.author: Mary Pickford

CIPHER.458.cipherString: Today you'll see if we can fit a hundred yards of spaghetti noodles in our mouths... while busting my brothers!
CIPHER.458.question: Here's a quote by Candace in her new show, iCandace. It has been encoded as a K2 Aristocrat cipher. Which keyword did she use to encode it?

CIPHER.460.cipherString: I am climbing a difficult road but the glory gives me strength.
CIPHER.460.question: Frozen inside an ice core sample from Antarctica: this Fractionated Morse message by Sextus Propertius. You are told that the quote has GLORY in it corresponding to the encoded text Z F N B J N V J W, meaning B = ●×–; F = –●×; J = ––×; N = ●–●; V = ×–●; W = ×––; Z = ××–. What does it say?
CIPHER.460.author: Sextus Propertius

CIPHER.466.cipherString: I paint energy, not the soul.
CIPHER.466.question: This code is found written in chalk on the sidewalk outside the science building. It's a quote by Kazimir Malevich, written in a Hill Cipher with a keyword of HUED. Please decode the message.
CIPHER.466.author: Kazimir Malevich

CIPHER.461.cipherString: Un mago que vomita arañas conspira contra ellos, dos zombis quieren regresar a la vida y un asesino los persigue.
CIPHER.461.question: This is a quote from the description of the Spanish-language edition of a book from a popular series about the adventures of a twosome. It has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt with an English keyword. What does it say?

CIPHER.462.cipherString: A book must be an ice-axe to break the seas frozen inside our soul.
CIPHER.462.question: A message by Franz Kafka encrypted with a keyword length of 5 with the Nihilist Substitution Cipher has been received. The 29th through 39th cipher units (34 24 58 64 26 53 57 87 96 28 62) decode to be E SEAS FROZEN. What does it say?
CIPHER.462.author: Franz Kafka

CIPHER.463.cipherString: Time will be quantitatively described only in terms of change in the network of relationships that describes space.
CIPHER.463.question: This string of symbols appears on the display of a malfunctioning calculator. It hides a quote by Lee Smolin, encoded as an Aristocrat using a K3 alphabet. What was the K3 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.463.author: Lee Smolin

CIPHER.464.question: Found taped under a desk in study hall: this Cryptarithm puzzle. What do the values 9880 173827 decode to?

CIPHER.465.cipherString: Don't cry over spilled milk. By this time tomorrow, it'll be free yogurt.
CIPHER.465.question: A phrase by Stephen Colbert has been encoded as a Porta cipher using a keyword of CHEESE. What does it say?
CIPHER.465.author: Stephen Colbert

CIPHER.467.cipherString: Neither by entreaty nor by a bribe.
CIPHER.467.question: A message was left on the whiteboard after your AP US History class. It's a quote encoded using a Hill cipher with a keyword of INTRIGUED. What does it say?
